shortDescription: Translate any language by tapping the globe
fullDescription:
TalkAtlas is the world's most beautiful translation app. Spin a stunning 3D globe, tap any country, and instantly translate to that country's language.

Features:
• Interactive 3D globe with 195 countries
• Voice input — speak and translate
• Text-to-speech — hear your translation
• 30+ languages supported
• Cinematic space background with planets and nebulae

Premium — £1.99/month
• Unlimited translations
• Remove ads
• Priority language support

permissions.microphone: Used for voice input so you can speak to translate
permissions.internet: Required to fetch translations and country data
